║ ☿ Mercury Mind, communication, the messenger ║
║ ☉ Sol Gold, perfection, the Great Work complete ║
║ ☽ Luna Silver, intuition, the dreaming self ║
║ ☥ Ankh Eternal life — the philosopher's stone awaits ║
║ ∞ Ouroboros The cycle that devours and renews itself ║

┃ D = log(3) / log(2) ≈ 1.585 ┃

┏━ ⍟ T H E R I F T ⍟ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ ┃
┃ 「 S A C R E D G E O M E T R Y M A N I F O L D 」 ┃

║ ║
║ Hope pours endlessly ║
║ from vessel to stream, ║
║ stream to ocean, and ║
║ ocean back to star. ║
║ ║
